evals.prompt: I've made changes to the auth module and want to run a full quality check before creating a PR.
evals.expected_output: Creates state file, detects changed files via git diff, runs devops-test-gen to generate missing tests for auth changes, runs devops-japanese-comments on changed files including new tests, runs review on the diff, runs cso security audit. Auto-proceeds between stages unless critical issues found. Reports final verdict.

evals.prompt: PR전 체크 해줘. 결제 모듈 수정했어.
evals.expected_output: Korean trigger recognized. Full pipeline: devops-test-gen for payment module tests, devops-japanese-comments for comment enforcement, review for code quality, cso for security audit on payment-related changes. Extra attention on security stage for payment code.

evals.prompt: The test generation stage already ran. Resume the quality pipeline from Japanese comments.
evals.expected_output: Detects existing pipeline-state.json with devops-test-gen completed. Resumes from devops-japanese-comments stage, skipping test generation. Continues through review and cso stages.
